changes: Cached sound effects earlier for smoother dragging
Shapes shrink down when dragged to tray return area
Fixed an issue where shapes could be dragged while the grid was inactive
New game menu with audio, controls, and display settings
Full volume control, sticky grid tunings, and confirm before placing
CRT filter modes, plus a new unlockable FN 80Z theme and tweaked DMG theme
Game over screen shows additional stats
Bug fixes and UI tweaks
New accessibility themes for colourblind and low-vision players
Clearer messaging when the game reconnects in the background
Chain bonus should no longer be lost on resume
Clearing multiple lines at once now rewards a bigger bonus
Shape tray generation is now more balanced
Resume a game from any device with account login
Bug fixes
Dark mode added, plus unlockable themes. Complete challenges to earn them
New stats screen with a shareable summary card
Bug fixes
Account creation and login
Ranked leaderboard
Bug fixes and performance improvements
